name: Zara Slim Fit Cotton Shirt
description: Premium quality slim-fit cotton shirt from Zara Men. Light, breathable fabric perfect for smart-casual wear.

name: Zara Casual Denim Jacket
description: Classic Zara Denim Jacket in washed blue. Features button closures, chest pockets, and comfortable fit.

name: Zara Chino Pants
description: Slim chino trousers from Zara. Made of soft stretch-cotton twill with front and back pockets.

name: Shein Everyday Basic Tee
description: Soft cotton basic crewneck t-shirt from Shein Men. Durable wash-and-wear style for daily comfort.

name: Shein Streetwear Hoodie
description: Loose fit casual drawstring hoodie from Shein. Made of heavyweight fleece with kangaroo pocket.

name: Shein Casual Cotton Shorts
description: Drawstring casual shorts from Shein Men. Perfect for active days or home lounging.

name: Bleu de Chanel EDP
description: An exquisite, woody-aromatic fragrance for men. Notes of fresh citrus blended with amber and cedarwood.

name: Sauvage Dior Cologne
description: Dior Sauvage features raw freshness, with top notes of pepper and Calabria bergamot, leading to noble woody notes.

name: Creed Aventus Perfume
description: The exceptional Creed Aventus celebrates strength, power and success. Featuring premium fruit, birch, and oakmoss notes.

name: Classic Black Embroidered Abaya
description: Elegant black abaya featuring high-quality fabric and delicate gold embroidery along the sleeves and hemline.

name: Modern Royal Kaftan Abaya
description: Stunning silk kaftan abaya featuring a loose modest flow design. Perfect for formal and celebratory gatherings.

name: Matte Liquid Lipstick Zara
description: Long-wear matte liquid lipstick from Zara Beauty. Smudge-proof formula with rich velvet pigment.

name: 12-Color Eyeshadow Palette
description: Versatile neutral-to-bold eyeshadow palette. Highly blendable matte and shimmer finishes.

name: Satin Liquid Foundation
description: Hydrating satin-finish liquid foundation. Medium buildable coverage for a natural, flawless look.

name: Genuine Leather Dress Belt
description: Full-grain black leather belt with silver stainless steel buckle. Pairs perfectly with chinos and trousers.

name: Classic Aviator Sunglasses
description: Polarized metal frame aviator sunglasses. Offers 100% UV protection and high durability.

name: Chronograph Quartz Wrist Watch
description: Luxury silver stainless steel wrist watch for men. Features blue dial chronograph face and date window.
